SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config

Class CoordinatorConfig

java.lang.Object
com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.CoordinatorConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer
@Configuration public class CoordinatorConfig extends Object implements org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer
Spring configuration that wires CoordinatorFaultStrategy implementations into a Map<FaultType, CoordinatorFaultStrategy> bean consumed by the fault-injection service, and registers the crash interceptor.

    void
    addInterceptors(org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.InterceptorRegistry registry)
    Registers the crash interceptor on all API paths.

    coordinatorFaultStrategies(CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy crash, PartialSendFaultStrategy partialSend, DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy delayedDecision)
    Exposes all coordinator fault strategies keyed by FaultType.
    CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy
    crashCoordinatorFaultStrategy()
    Singleton bean for the crash-fault strategy so the interceptor and the strategy map share the same instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoordinatorConfig

      public CoordinatorConfig()

  • Method Details

    • coordinatorFaultStrategies

      @Bean public Map<FaultType,CoordinatorFaultStrategy> coordinatorFaultStrategies(CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy crash, PartialSendFaultStrategy partialSend, DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy delayedDecision)
      Exposes all coordinator fault strategies keyed by FaultType.
      Parameters:
      crash - strategy simulating a coordinator crash.
      partialSend - strategy simulating partial Phase-2 delivery.
      delayedDecision - strategy simulating a stalled decision broadcast.
      Returns:
      immutable strategy map.

    • crashCoordinatorFaultStrategy

      @Bean public CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy crashCoordinatorFaultStrategy()
      Singleton bean for the crash-fault strategy so the interceptor and the strategy map share the same instance.
      Returns:
      a new CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy.

    • partialSendFaultStrategy

      @Bean public PartialSendFaultStrategy partialSendFaultStrategy()
      Singleton bean for the partial-send fault strategy.
      Returns:
      a new PartialSendFaultStrategy.

    • delayedDecisionFaultStrategy

      @Bean public DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy delayedDecisionFaultStrategy()
      Singleton bean for the delayed-decision fault strategy.
      Returns:
      a new DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy.

    • addInterceptors

      public void addInterceptors(org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.InterceptorRegistry registry)
      Registers the crash interceptor on all API paths.
      Specified by:
      addInterceptors in interface org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer
      Parameters:
      registry - Spring's interceptor registry.
